sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, text_column VARCHAR, time_column TIME);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'DuckDB', TIME '06:30:00'), (2, 'Database', TIME '08:45:00');
SELECT id, array_slice(text_column, 1, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1) - 1) AS slice_result FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, array_slice(text_column, -2, -1) AS negative_slice FROM test_strings WHERE time_column - INTERVAL 1 HOUR > TIME '07:00:00';
SELECT id, array_slice(text_column, 0, (SELECT MAX(LENGTH(text_column)) FROM test_strings)) AS extended_slice FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, array_slice(text_column, 1, 5) FROM test_strings WHERE (time_column - INTERVAL 3 HOUR) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (data_id INT, related_time TIME, data VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO additional_data VALUES (1, TIME '05:00:00', 'Example Data'), (2, TIME '07:00:00', 'More Data');

SELECT ts.id, ad.data, array_slice(ts.text_column, 1, 3) FROM test_strings ts JOIN additional_data ad ON ad.related_time = ts.time_column - INTERVAL 1 HOUR GROUP BY ts.id, ad.data HAVING array_slice(ts.text_column, 1, 3) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, array_slice(text_column, NULL, NULL) AS null_slice FROM test_strings WHERE time_column IS NULL;
SELECT id, array_slice(text_column, -1, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM additional_data) + 1) AS edge_case_slice FROM test_strings;
